raw.message: Play anywhere: short heists, smart puzzles, real fun.

hook.summary: A stickman character uses a stretchy arm to steal a phone in a library setting.
hook.visual_action: A long, black arm stretches from one desk, loops around a rotating fan, and reaches for a phone on the opposite desk.
hook.text_overlay: WELCOME TO THIEF PUZZLE WHERE YOU GET TO ENJOY FUNNY PUZZLE LEVELS
hook.voiceover_transcript: Welcome to Thief Puzzle where you get to enjoy funny puzzle levels

scene_flow: Introduction of the core mechanic: stretching a stickman's arm to steal objects.
A quick 'OOPS!!!' fail state is shown to demonstrate the puzzle's difficulty.
The arm successfully navigates around a desk fan to reach the target phone.
A series of text overlays highlight game features like brain tests and puzzle variety.
Final branding screen featuring the game logo and a call to download.
on_screen_text: AND ANYONE WHO ENJOYS OUTSMARTING A CHALLENGE
audience_proxy: Casual gamers of all ages who enjoy lighthearted, physics-based puzzle games and humorous brain teasers.
